speedMultiplier.description: Speed of player and speed of opponent * multiplySpeed. Make it 0.5 to make speed of both x2 times slower or 2 to make it faster

textEntity.title: Text Entity
textEntity.description: The Entity that has the text Element to update with the inputted text.

inputType.title: Input Type
inputType.description: What type of input will this field accept. On some devices, the virtual keyboard layout may change as well. For example, 'Number' will bring up a numpad instead of the full keyboard.

enterKeyHint.title: Enter Key Hint
enterKeyHint.description: Change what the enter key shows on the virutal keyboard. Different OSs will have different representations of the hint.

maxLength.title: Max Length
maxLength.description: Maximum length of the text can be.

placeHolder.title: Place Holder String
placeHolder.description: When the inputted text is empty, what should show as placeholder? Usually this is a prompt such as 'Enter your email here'.

placeHolderColor.title: Place Holder Text Color
placeHolderColor.description: What color the text should be when the placeholder string is used.

coinsForAd.description: The amount of coins player needs to open box by watching ad

interfaceEntity.title: Interface
interfaceEntity.description: Root entity of the editor UI

paletteEntity.title: Item Palette
paletteEntity.description: Scroll view the catalog item buttons live in

itemButtonTemplate.title: Item Button Template
itemButtonTemplate.description: Disabled UI button cloned once per catalog item

colorWheelEntity.title: Color Wheel
colorWheelEntity.description: HSV wheel image (element useInput on); click/drag picks hue + saturation

wheelSelectPoint.title: Wheel Select Point
wheelSelectPoint.description: Dot the script moves to the picked hue/saturation on the wheel

valueBarEntity.title: Value Bar
valueBarEntity.description: Horizontal brightness bar (element useInput on); click/drag picks value (dark→light)

valueSelectPoint.title: Value Select Point
valueSelectPoint.description: Dot the script moves along the value bar

finalColorDisplay.title: Final Color
finalColorDisplay.description: Swatch element recolored to the current picked color

thumbnailCameraEntity.title: Thumbnail Camera
thumbnailCameraEntity.description: ThumbnailCamera entity; while it owns the screen the fly controls move it instead of the editor camera

editorPopupViews.title: Editor Popup Views
editorPopupViews.description: Views controlled by the local editor popup shell

gameCameraEntity.title: Game Camera
gameCameraEntity.description: Main gameplay camera hidden while editing

gamePlayerEntity.title: Game Player
gamePlayerEntity.description: Gameplay player root hidden while editing

gameOverlayEntity.title: Game Overlay
gameOverlayEntity.description: Gameplay UI root hidden while editing

testSpawnPosition.title: Test Spawn Position
testSpawnPosition.description: World-space map center used when starting a map test

tabButtons.title: Tab Buttons (each carries Button.js; matched by its value)

createMapSpacerTemplate.title: Create Map Spacer Template
createMapSpacerTemplate.description: Disabled authored layout spacer cloned when the final row needs empty columns

mapEditorEntity.title: Map Editor
mapEditorEntity.description: MapEditor script entity that owns the current saved map id

uploadOverlay.title: Upload Overlay
uploadOverlay.description: Authored upload veil inside Preview Overlay
